name: Currency Exchange International
description_short: Currency Exchange International buys and sells 80+ foreign currencies with daily stock, plus gold bullion coins and bars. Serves travelers and currency traders from San Diego locations.
description_long:
Currency Exchange International (CXI) is a foreign currency exchange and precious metals dealer operating in San Diego with locations in Mission Valley and North County. The company specializes in converting between major world currencies and the US dollar, positioning itself as a convenient alternative to banks and airports for travelers and currency traders.

CXI's primary services include buying and selling more than 80 foreign currencies held in daily stock, online and phone reservations, gold bullion coin and bar sales, and currency price protection programs. They specifically stock popular currencies including the European Euro, Canadian Dollar, British Pound Sterling, Mexican Peso, and Japanese Yen. The company also accepts limited foreign currency coins (EUR, GBX, CAD, MXN only) for exchange.

The company distinguishes itself through operational convenience—maintaining physical currency inventory daily reduces wait times for travelers, online reservation options streamline transactions, and their stated Best Rate Guarantee and Currency Price Protection offerings provide rate security. Operating hours extend into evenings (8-9pm most days) and weekends, accommodating travelers with less flexible schedules compared to traditional banks.

As a currency exchange and precious metals dealer, CXI operates outside traditional consumer finance regulatory frameworks, meaning consumer protections available through banking oversight or credit agencies do not apply. The company's focus on foreign exchange and bullion sales makes it narrowly specialized; it does not provide credit products, financial planning, or broader financial services. The lack of detailed fee transparency on the public-facing profile and absence of third-party rating information limits ability to assess competitive positioning.
address: 1640 Camino Del Rio N Suite 309, San Diego, CA 92108

company_info.headquarters: 1640 Camino Del Rio N Suite 309, San Diego, CA 92108

pros: Maintains 80+ foreign currencies in daily stock, eliminating wait times for travelers
Extended operating hours (8-9pm weekdays, 10am-9pm weekends) exceed typical bank hours
Online and phone reservation system allows customers to reserve currency before visiting
Dual locations in Mission Valley and North County provide geographic convenience
Sells gold bullion coins and bars, diversifying beyond currency exchange
States Best Rate Guarantee and Currency Price Protection programs for rate security
Direct contact via phone (619-574-0133) and email (missionvalley@cxifx.com) for customer service
cons: No fee schedule or exchange rate transparency available on company profile
No independent customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification provided
Foreign currency coin exchanges limited to 4 currencies (EUR, GBP, CAD, MXN only); other coins explicitly not accepted
Operates outside traditional banking regulation, with limited consumer protections compared to FDIC-insured institutions
Website listing provides minimal detail on Best Rate Guarantee and Currency Price Protection terms and conditions
best_for: International travelers needing foreign currency before departure with flexible evening/weekend hours
Expats and immigrants regularly sending money or exchanging currency to home countries
Gold bullion and precious metals investors seeking physical coin and bar purchases
Customers dissatisfied with bank or airport foreign exchange rates seeking alternative dealers
diagnosis: Currency Exchange International is best for international travelers and currency traders seeking convenient after-hours foreign exchange with daily inventory availability, particularly those needing to avoid bank or airport exchange markups. Primary caveat: the company operates outside traditional financial regulation with no published fee transparency or independent customer ratings, making rate and service quality comparisons difficult for consumers.
services: Gold bullion coins and bars sales
Limited foreign currency coin acceptance (EUR, GBP, CAD, MXN)
